2603.16790.title: InCoder-32B: Code Foundation Model for Industrial Scenarios
2603.16790.paper_summary: Recent code large language models have achieved remarkable progress on general programming tasks. Nevertheless, their performance degrades significantly in industrial scenarios that require reasoning about hardware semantics, specialized language constructs, and strict resource constraints. To address these challenges, we introduce InCoder-32B (Industrial-Coder-32B), the first 32B-parameter code foundation model unifying code intelligence across chip design, GPU kernel optimization, embedded systems, compiler optimization, and 3D modeling. By adopting an efficient architecture, we train InCoder-32B from scratch with general code pre-training, curated industrial code annealing, mid-training that progressively extends context from 8K to 128K tokens with synthetic industrial reasoning data, and post-training with execution-grounded verification. We conduct extensive evaluation on 14 mainstream general code benchmarks and 9 industrial benchmarks spanning 4 specialized domains. Results show InCoder-32B achieves highly competitive performance on general tasks while establishing strong open-source baselines across industrial domains.
2603.16790.paper_summary_zh: 最近的代碼大型語言模型在一般編程任務上取得了顯著的進展。<lb/>然而，它們在需要推理硬體語義、專門語言結構和嚴格資源限制的工業場景中的表現顯著下降。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們推出了InCoder-32B（工業編碼器-32B），這是第一個統一芯片設計、GPU內核優化、嵌入式系統、編譯器優化和3D建模的32B參數代碼基礎模型。<lb/>通過採用高效的架構，我們從零開始訓練InCoder-32B，進行一般代碼的預訓練、精心策劃的工業代碼退火、中期訓練，逐步將上下文從8K擴展到128K個標記，並使用合成工業推理數據進行後期訓練，並進行執行基礎的驗證。<lb/>我們在14個主流的一般代碼基準和9個涵蓋4個專業領域的工業基準上進行了廣泛的評估。<lb/>結果顯示，InCoder-32B在一般任務上達到了高度競爭的表現，同時在工業領域建立了強大的開源基準。
2603.16790.author: Jian Yang et.al.
2603.16790.authors: Jian Yang, Wei Zhang, Jiajun Wu, Junhang Cheng, Shawn Guo, Haowen Wang, Weicheng Gu, Yaxin Du, Joseph Li, Fanglin Xu, Yizhi Li, Lin Jing, Yuanbo Wang, Yuhan Gao, Ruihao Gong, Chuan Hao, Ran Tao, Aishan Liu, Tuney Zheng, Ganqu Cui, Zhoujun Li, Mingjie Tang, Chenghua Lin, Wayne Xin Zhao, Xianglong Liu, Ming Zhou, Bryan Dai, Weifeng Lv
